author: lOrm
content: Duplicate of #820 (already closed 2026-05-20 07:13) — same defect (execute_lsp accepts arbitrary file_path with no sandbox), same location (src/tools/lsp.rs:79-152), same mandated refactor (project-root check + credential denylist + size cap + env scrub). Verified at HEAD 80439851: related controls have landed — #648 (10 MiB LSP_MAX_FILE_SIZE guard at src/tools/lsp.rs:540-561) and #650 (is_lsp_connected gate at lsp.rs:528-538) and #869 (env scrub on LSP child). The project-root constraint and credential-path denylist portion is still not implemented in current code, but tracking continues under #820 rather than this duplicate. Closing as duplicate; if the residual denylist work needs its own ticket, file fresh rather than reopening.
